subject: FW: for jeffrey
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Martin Nowak [mailto:nowak@fas.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Thursday, October 11, 2007 5:43 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: for jeffrey


dear lesley,
could you please forward to JE.
many thanks
martin

----------------------

dear jeffrey,
we are on the front cover of nature today!
(and on the front cover of the harvard web page.) erez designed the
hourglass.
best wishes
martin
